title: Mr. Lif’s Emergency Rations EP is post-9/11 hip hop at its most daring
summary: Mr. Lif's 2002 Emergency Rations EP was a standout piece of politically conscious hip hop from Definitive Jux's pioneering early 2000s era, released as a precursor to his full-length album I, Phantom. The label, helmed by El-P, established itself as a hub for experimental and politically minded hip hop acts, with Lif representing the most traditionally conscious of their roster.
content:
First, you drop bombs, then you send aid. Totally logical. | Image: Definitive Jux	

There was a period in the early aughts when Definitive Jux (nee: Def Jux) seemed like it was going to be the future of hip hop. While the label featured plenty of experimental, boundary-pushing, and politically minded acts, Lif stood out as the most "conscious rapper" in the traditional sense. It was clear though, that label head El-P envisioned that as an important part of Def Jux's identity, as the first record it put out was 2000's Enter the Colossus EP, from Lif.
Mr. Lif's follow-up was 2002's Emergency Rations EP, a sort of place setter for the full-length I, Phantom just a couple of months later. It opens with a skit about Lif missing …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Mr. Lif的《Emergency Rations》EP：9/11后最大胆的嘻哈音乐
zh.summary: Mr. Lif 2002年的《Emergency Rations》EP是来自Definitive Jux厂牌早期2000年代先锋时代的杰出政治意识嘻哈作品，作为他全长专辑《I, Phantom》的前驱发行。该厂牌由El-P领导，确立了自己作为实验性和政治意识嘻哈艺术家中心的地位，Lif代表了他们阵容中最传统的政治意识代表。

title: Amazon will stop accepting new customers for Mechanical Turk
summary: Amazon announced it will stop accepting new customers for Mechanical Turk, potentially marking the end of the crowdsourcing platform that has provided gig work for over a decade. The decision suggests shifting priorities at Amazon regarding its gig work offerings.
content: These may be the last days of Amazon’s Mechanical Turk.

zh.title: 亚马逊将停止接受Mechanical Turk的新用户
zh.summary: 亚马逊宣布将停止接受Mechanical Turk平台的新用户，这可能标志着这个十多年来提供零工机会的众包平台的终结。这一决定反映出亚马逊在零工工作业务方面的优先事项发生了转变。

title: Where to preorder Grand Theft Auto VI
summary: Rockstar's highly anticipated Grand Theft Auto VI launches November 19, 2026 on PlayStation 5 and Xbox Series S/X, with preloading beginning November 12. The Standard edition costs $79.99 while the Ultimate edition is $99.99, both including the Vintage Vice City Pack of in-game cosmetics.
content:
A look at in-game cosmetics you’ll get with the Ultimate edition. | Image: Rockstar Games	

Rockstar's long-awaited Grand Theft Auto VI is launching November 19th, 2026 for PlayStation 5 and Xbox Series S/X consoles. The game will be available digitally at launch, with physical cases containing codes, not discs, so your options for preordering are straightforward. The preloading phase for the game begins on November 12th, which should give you plenty of time to install the game. 
There are two versions of the game to choose from, the $79.99 Standard and $99.99 Ultimate editions. Both include the same preorder perks. You'll get the Vintage Vice City Pack when the game launches. It's a set of in-game items that includes vehicles, we …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 在哪里预购侠盗猎车手VI
zh.summary: Rockstar备受期待的《侠盗猎车手VI》将于2026年11月19日在PlayStation 5和Xbox Series S/X上发布，预加载于11月12日开始。标准版价格为$79.99，终极版为$99.99，两个版本都包含复古罪恶城游戏内装饰品包。

title: 5 desk gadgets that can make your workday better
summary: The article explores five desk gadgets designed to reduce clutter, improve focus, and enhance productivity throughout the workday. These tools aim to streamline desk organization and workflow efficiency.
content: The right desk gadgets can help you reduce clutter, stay focused, and add a little extra convenience to your day.

zh.title: 5款可以让你的工作日更好的办公桌小工具
zh.summary: 本文探讨了五款办公桌小工具，旨在减少杂乱、改善专注力并提高工作日的生产力。这些工具旨在简化办公桌组织和工作流程效率。

title: Infuriating Google commercial imagines the founding fathers embracing AI
summary: Google released a Workspace and Gemini advertisement depicting the founding fathers using modern collaboration tools and AI to draft the Declaration of Independence. The ad has drawn criticism for its cringe factor in imagining historical figures embracing contemporary tech solutions.
content:
I call BS: the founding fathers definitely would have been Microsoft Teams users. | Image: Google	

"Group project, but make it 1776." That's how a new commercial for Google Workspace opens. And things only get cringier from there. The clip imagines what it would be like if the founding fathers turned to Google's collaboration tools and Gemini to help them draft the Declaration of Independence. 
Ben Franklin texts Thomas Jefferson to check on the status of a draft, who takes a photo and uses AI to transcribe it into a Google Doc. Franklin and Adams hop in to make edits in suggestion mode, Gemini finds them a meeting time, takes notes during a Google Meet call, and then Nano Banana whips up a seal for the United States featuring a turkey ( …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 令人恼火的谷歌广告想象建国先贤拥抱人工智能
zh.summary: 谷歌发布了一则Workspace和Gemini广告，描绘建国先贤使用现代协作工具和人工智能起草《独立宣言》。这则广告因将历史人物想象成拥抱当代科技解决方案而引起批评，被认为很不得体。

title: The Sourdough Sidekick automates the boring bit of baking
summary: The Sourdough Sidekick, co-developed with King Arthur Baking Company, automates starter management for sourdough bakers by automatically feeding the starter on a schedule. This allows bakers to focus on the more satisfying aspects of sourdough production like kneading, shaping, and baking.
content:
The Sourdough Sidekick was codeveloped with King Arthur Baking Company.	

Baking sourdough bread is inherently old-fashioned, relying on natural fermentation and wild yeast instead of the simple, predictable commercial stuff. So it might sound anathema to bring a gadget into the mix. 
The trick to the Sourdough Sidekick - backed and branded by King Arthur flour - is that it promises to automate the boring bit of sourdough baking: starter management. It feeds your starter flour and water on a set schedule, ready for exactly when you want to bake, leaving you to focus on kneading, shaping, and the actual baking. 
Like any single-purpose kitchen gadget, you'll have to be confident you'll get enough use to justify b …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 酸面包助手自动化烘焙中乏味的部分
zh.summary: 酸面包助手与King Arthur烘焙公司联合开发，通过按时间表自动喂养酸种来自动化酸面包烘焙师的酸种管理。这使烘焙师能够专注于酸面包制作中更令人满足的方面，如揉面、塑形和烘焙。

title: How Keurig saved — and ruined — your coffee
summary: This episode of Version History explores how Keurig revolutionized office coffee by offering fresh, individual cups on demand, but the single-cup brewer's success spawned the ubiquitous K-Cup pods that became pervasive in offices and homes across America. The story examines how an elegant solution to a common problem evolved into something vastly larger than originally envisioned.
content:
Before Keurig, the coffee in your office was almost certainly terrible. Old, burned, made by someone who would rather poorly eyeball than properly measure. Just altogether gross. After Keurig? You could make your own coffee, a cup at a time, exactly when you needed it. The single-cup brewer was an elegant solution to an extremely common problem. At least, that's how it started.
On this episode of Version History, we dig into the history of the Keurig, and the ways in which the idea got vastly bigger than anyone expected. K-Cups and Keurig machines became ubiquitous in offices all across the US, then quickly began to invade our homes as well …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Keurig如何拯救又毁掉了你的咖啡
zh.summary: 这期《版本历史》节目讲述了Keurig如何通过提供新鲜、按需的个人咖啡来彻底改变办公室咖啡文化。然而，这款单杯咖啡机的成功催生了无处不在的K-Cup胶囊，这些胶囊在美国的办公室和家庭中变得极其普遍。该节目展示了一个优雅的解决方案如何演变成远超最初设想的庞大现象。

title: What is Bending Spoons? The little-known AOL and Vimeo owner that’s now public
summary: Bending Spoons, which owns AOL and Vimeo, has recently gone public despite remaining largely unknown to the general public. The company's portfolio of products has reached over a billion users globally, making its public debut significant for the media and technology industry.
content: Bending Spoons remains largely unknown, even as its portfolio of products has served more than a billion people.

zh.title: Bending Spoons是什么？这家不为人知的AOL和Vimeo所有者现已上市
zh.summary: 拥有AOL和Vimeo的Bending Spoons最近上市，尽管在普通大众中仍然鲜为人知。该公司的产品组合已在全球拥有超过10亿用户，使其上市对媒体和科技产业具有重要意义。

title: Vizio accidentally made the best dumb TV on the market
summary: Vizio has released a 65-inch Mini LED Quantum TV priced under $398, making it the cheapest quantum-dot TV on the market. The standout feature is that it functions excellently as a "dumb TV," offering high-quality hardware without requiring the smart TV features.
content:
Vizio OS works well, but you don’t even need to use it.	

When I first started testing Vizio's 65-inch Mini LED Quantum TV, I thought the big story was that Vizio was back and that it had a quantum-dot TV for under $398 - the cheapest on the market. Vizio's been pretty quiet since it was acquired by Walmart in 2024, so putting out a TV with quantum dots, which allow for higher brightness levels and more accurate color, at a budget price seemed like a strong comeback.
But that's not the big story. While those two points are intriguing, the big news about the Mini LED Quantum TV is that Vizio accidentally made the best dumb TV on the market.
Vizio Mini LED Quantum TV

Where to Buy:

 $398 at Walmart ( …

Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Vizio意外打造了市场上最好的"非智能电视"
zh.summary: Vizio推出了一款65英寸Mini LED量子电视，价格低于398美元，成为市场上最便宜的量子点电视。突出特点是它作为"非智能电视"表现出色，提供高质量硬件而无需智能电视功能。

title: Almost 90 new unicorns have been minted so far this year — here they are
summary: Nearly 90 startups have achieved unicorn status so far this year, driven by an investor frenzy fueled by AI developments. The rapid pace of unicorn creation reflects increased venture capital activity and growing valuations in the startup ecosystem.
content: With AI igniting an investor frenzy, more startups are achieving unicorn status every month.

zh.title: 今年迄今已诞生近90家新独角兽——它们在这里
zh.summary: 今年迄今已有近90家初创公司达到独角兽地位，由AI发展带动的投资者热潮所驱动。独角兽创造的快速步伐反映了风险投资活动的增加和初创生态系统中估值的增长。

title: Xbox is a disaster
summary: The article examines the troubled state of Xbox and the broader video game industry, using Microsoft's Summer Game Fest showcase as a case study. Despite the company's presentation of major titles like Halo and Gears of War, the piece highlights structural challenges facing the gaming sector.
content:
Gears of War: E-Day.	

This is The Stepback, a weekly newsletter breaking down one essential story from the tech world. For more on the bleak state of the video game industry, follow Andrew Webster. The Stepback arrives in our subscribers' inboxes on Sunday at 8AM ET. Opt in for The Stepback here.
How it started
Microsoft closed out Summer Game Fest with a bang. The company's annual June showcase was packed with crowd-pleasers: Halo, Gears of War, Fable, a translucent Xbox, and even some pleasant surprises like new Persona and Crazy Taxi games. It was the kind of event that harkened back to the boisterous days of E3, when the industry was in a healthier place an …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Xbox陷入困境
zh.summary: 这篇文章以微软Summer Game Fest展会为案例研究，审视了Xbox和更广泛的电子游戏行业的困难状况。尽管公司展示了《光环》和《战争机器》等主要游戏，但这篇文章强调了游戏部门面临的结构性挑战。

title: Chemical accidents rise as Trump administration proposes weakening safety rules
summary: Chemical accidents have risen sharply, with injuries and fatalities from chemical incidents increasing nearly 50 percent in recent years. The Trump administration's proposal to weaken safety regulations raises concerns about further increases in workplace and environmental hazards.
content: Chemicals from accidents that injured or killed people increased by nearly 50 percent in recent years.

zh.title: 化工事故增加 特朗普政府提议削弱安全规则
zh.summary: 近年来化学事故大幅增加，化学事故造成的伤亡人数增加近50%。特朗普政府削弱安全法规的提议引发了人们对工作场所和环保灾害进一步增加的担忧。

title: The missing 500 million: Cosmic bombardment melted Earth's first crust
summary: A new study suggests that cosmic bombardment, rather than just internal heat, may have melted Earth's early crust during the Hadean period. This discovery helps explain a previously mysterious gap in the geological record from Earth's formation.
content: The heat of the Hadean may have come from impacts as well as the interior.

zh.title: 失踪的5亿：宇宙轰击融化了地球最初的地壳
zh.summary: 一项新研究表明，在冥古宙时期，宇宙轰击而非仅内部热量可能融化了地球早期的地壳。这一发现有助于解释地球形成时期地质记录中之前神秘的空白。
